appDescription.message: See all open tabs in the side panel with titles and snippets; click a card to switch. Local only.

brandSubtitle.message: Click a card to switch tabs

statusSwitchFailed.message: Could not switch: the tab may have been closed.

snippetDiscarded.message: Tab is discarded; open it once to load a snippet.

snippetRestricted.message: Could not read page text (restricted or special page).

snippetUnsupported.message: This page type does not support text snippets.
